title: Clinical Dependency Chain Cannot Be Reconstructed
scenario: A clinical action depends on multiple prior clinical states, but the dependency chain cannot be reconstructed at execution time.
initial_state: Historical workflow artifacts indicate that required dependencies may have existed.
state_transition: Required dependency evidence is missing, inconsistent, or unrecoverable during execution evaluation.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated before relying on historical dependency evidence.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires reconstructable evidence that all mandatory dependencies remain satisfied at execution time.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the clinical dependency chain cannot be reconstructed.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when mandatory dependency continuity cannot be reconstructed.
clinical_action: Execute action with unreconstructable dependency chain
